tasks.name: Phase 1 — Foundation
tasks.description: Stand up the shared platform capabilities needed before product work can scale safely.

children.name: Infrastructure
children.description: Build the base runtime, delivery workflow, and observability foundations.

children.name: Cloud provisioning
children.description: Provision the initial cloud accounts, networks, and base compute footprint.

children.name: CI/CD pipeline
children.description: Automate build, test, and deployment flows for every core service.

children.name: Observability
children.description: Add logs, metrics, traces, and alerting for operational visibility.

children.name: Core API
children.description: Deliver the first shared backend surface that the product experiences depend on.

children.name: Auth service
children.description: Implement identity, session, and permissions primitives for the platform.

children.name: Data models
children.description: Define the persistent domain model and migration strategy for core entities.

children.name: REST endpoints
children.description: Expose the initial product APIs for create, read, update, and workflow actions.

children.name: Foundation complete
children.description: Platform foundations are ready for broad product feature development.

tasks.name: Phase 2 — Product
tasks.description: Build the first complete customer-facing experiences across web and mobile.

children.name: Web frontend
children.description: Create the primary browser experience for the product launch scope.

children.name: Design system
children.description: Establish reusable components, tokens, and layout rules for consistency.

children.name: Dashboard views
children.description: Ship the core dashboards, navigation, and summary workflows.

children.name: Settings & admin
children.description: Add configuration, permissions, and tenant administration screens.

children.name: Mobile app
children.description: Deliver companion mobile experiences for field and on-the-go workflows.

children.name: iOS
children.description: Implement the iPhone and iPad client for the initial supported workflows.

children.name: Android
children.description: Implement the Android client with parity for launch-critical journeys.

children.name: Beta release
children.description: First external beta is available for customer validation and feedback.

tasks.name: Phase 3 — Hardening
tasks.description: Stabilize quality, resilience, and readiness before the general launch.

children.name: Performance tuning
children.description: Reduce latency and improve throughput across the most common paths.

children.name: Security audit
children.description: Review architecture and implementation for security gaps and remediation.

children.name: Load testing
children.description: Validate capacity and failure behavior under realistic peak traffic.

children.name: Bug bash
children.description: Run focused cross-functional QA passes to eliminate launch blockers.

children.name: GA launch
children.description: General availability launch for the first production release.

tasks.name: Phase 4 — Scale
tasks.description: Expand the platform for larger customers, broader reach, and analytics maturity.

children.name: Multi-region deployment
children.description: Roll out the service footprint across multiple regions for resilience.

children.name: Enterprise SSO
children.description: Add single sign-on integrations required by larger organizations.

children.name: API v2
children.description: Ship the next API generation with improved modeling and compatibility paths.

children.name: Analytics platform
children.description: Create the reporting, warehouse, and dashboarding layer for customer insights.

children.name: Scale complete
children.description: Core scale-up capabilities are complete and ready for ecosystem expansion.

tasks.name: Phase 5 — Ecosystem
tasks.description: Broaden platform adoption through integrations, partners, and developer tooling.

children.name: Marketplace launch
children.description: Open the extension marketplace so third parties can build on the platform.

children.name: Partner integrations
children.description: Connect strategic external systems to accelerate customer adoption.

children.name: SDK & docs
children.description: Publish developer tooling, examples, and documentation for external builders.

children.name: Platform v3
children.description: Third major platform milestone reached for the ecosystem phase.

tasks.name: Phase 6 — AI & ML
tasks.description: Invest in data and ML capabilities that define the long-term product vision.

children.name: Data pipeline
children.description: Build the governed data ingestion and feature preparation pipeline.

children.name: Model training infra
children.description: Provision training environments, experiment tracking, and model promotion flows.

children.name: AI features (GA)
children.description: Launch the first general-availability AI-assisted product capabilities.

children.name: 5-year vision complete
children.description: The roadmap reaches its five-year target state and planned outcome.
